title: 间歇性禁食对身体有巨大好处，汉族人为什么没有禁食日和斋戒习惯？

contents:
间歇性禁食对身体有巨大好处
汉族人却把吃当成第一要事。
穆斯林斋戒月期间，穆斯林不允许在日出和日落之间吃饭（8岁以下儿童除外）
赎罪日(Yom Kippur)是犹太人一年中最重要的圣日。在新年过后的第10天，这一天是犹太人一年中最庄严、最神圣的日子。对于虔诚的犹太人教徒而言，还是个“禁食日”，
印度教禁食日更多
Hinduism is marked by several periods of fasting. The most commonly-observed fast, Ekadashi, is respected approximately twice a month, on the eleventh day of each ascending and descending moon. The celebration at the beginning of the year, in honour of Shiva, is another important occasion. During the months of July and August, many Hindus adopt a vegetarian diet and fast on Mondays and Saturdays until the evening. Many Hindu women fast on Mondays in order to have a good husband.

吃多了就没有反抗，没时间思想，成了猪？

甘地與禁食: 甘地是宗教信仰禁食的狂熱支持者，並以此作為擺脫身體束縛的一種方式。然而，他也將禁食作為施加政治壓力的手段。他進行了幾次絕食抗議，以抗議特別是印度教徒之間或印度教徒與穆斯林之間發生的暴


Lifespan: Why We Age, and Why We Don't Have To is a non-fiction book authored by Australian-American biologist David A. Sinclair :
lifestyle changes including intermittent fasting and cold exposure have the potential to enhance human longevity.
